tables.name: Road Signs
rows: A milestone with the distance scratched out
Wagon ruts that suddenly just stop
A shrine, recently tended, to no god you recognize
Birds circling a spot with nothing visibly wrong
A signpost pointing to a place not on your map

tables.name: Road Company
rows: A peddler who trades only in stories
A pilgrim walking the wrong direction
A family fleeing something they won't name
A hermit who insists the road wasn't here last year
A courier with a message addressed to no one
A lone rider who never seems to get closer or farther

sections.title: Setting
lines: The road connects two places nobody agrees are still standing.
Nightfall on the road is when travelers stop talking to strangers.
The last inn was three days back; the next one is a rumor.

scene.title: The Milestone Is Wrong
scene.body: The milestone at the crossroads gives a distance that doesn't match anything you've walked. You're not sure which direction is the mistake.
